hero.title:
One link.
Every fan touchpoint.
hero.subtitle: Beam is the link-in-bio built for creators who care about design. Unite Instagram, YouTube, podcasts, products, and your email list on one beautiful page.
hero.ctaNote: No credit card. 30 seconds to live.

social.title: Every channel, one home
social.subtitle: Instagram, YouTube, TikTok, Threads, Spotify, LINE, and 30+ more — built-in icons, your brand color, one tap to follow.

features.title: Every block you need
features.description: Links, banners, videos, products, forms, calendars — drag and drop to build a page that's truly yours.

features.title: Theme your brand
features.description: 8 presets or fully custom colors, gradient backgrounds, and button styles. Your brand, pixel-perfect.

features.title: Real-time analytics
features.description: Track visitors, clicks, and top-performing blocks — and iterate on what actually works.

features.title: Sell digital products
features.description: Stripe built-in. Sell courses, e-books, and templates directly from your page — no storefront needed.

features.title: Grow your email list
features.description: Embed email capture forms, own your audience, and stop renting attention from the algorithm.

features.title: Multiple pages, one account
features.description: One account, many pages. Split by topic — courses, partnerships, personal — with named tabs.

steps.title: Create an account
steps.description: Pick a username. No credit card. Done in 30 seconds.

steps.title: Add your blocks
steps.description: Drag, drop, and edit. Preview updates instantly as you build.

steps.title: Share one link
steps.description: Drop it in your IG bio, YouTube, Threads, or anywhere else. One link to rule them all.

useCases.title: Built for every kind of creator

items.title: IG / YouTube creators
items.description: Send fans to your latest video, sponsorship link, or merch — all in one place.

items.title: Course & product sellers
items.description: Sell digital products with Stripe. Capture emails before launch. Run countdowns for limited offers.

items.title: Podcasters
items.description: Link Spotify, Apple Podcasts, and YouTube in one tap. Let listeners support you with a coffee.

pricing.title: Simple, honest pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more.

items.a: Yes. The free plan stays free forever. Upgrade to Pro only when you need unlimited blocks, more pages, or to remove the watermark.
Yes. Paste your linktr.ee or portaly.cc URL and Beam pulls your links, socials, name, bio, and avatar in 30 seconds.
Connect a Stripe account in settings. Add a product block, set a price, and customers buy directly from your page. Beam takes a small commission depending on plan.

items.q: Can I use a custom domain?
items.a: Yes, on the Premium plan. Point your domain at Beam and we handle SSL.

items.q: Do you take a cut of my email subscribers?
items.a: Never. Subscribers belong to you. Export the list anytime as CSV.

cropper.previewTitle: Preview: how it appears on the public page (same image, different display sizes)

success.title: Payment successful!
success.emailConfirm: A confirmation email has been sent to
success.fallbackBody: Your payment has been received, thanks for buying!

profile.subscribeError: Something went wrong, please try again

terms.metaDescriptionTpl: {name} terms of service — your rights and responsibilities when using the platform.
terms.intro: Welcome to {name}. Please read these terms carefully before using the service. By registering, accessing, or using {name}, you agree to be bound by these terms.

sections.title: 1. Service description
sections.body: {name} provides tools for building link-in-bio pages, selling digital products, collecting email lists, and viewing analytics. Features and plans may change over time. We'll notify you of major changes via the site or email.

sections.title: 2. Account registration
items: You must provide accurate and complete information when registering.
You are responsible for safeguarding your account and password. Any action through your account is treated as your own.
One person should register one account; abusive multi-registration may lead to suspension.

sections.title: 3. Restrictions
sections.body: You agree not to use {name} for any of the following:
items: Distributing illegal, hateful, harassing, sexual, or rights-infringing content
Selling illegal, counterfeit, or unlicensed goods
Fraud, money laundering, or other criminal activity
Operating the platform via automated tools or scraping at scale
Reverse engineering, cracking, or attempting unauthorized access

sections.title: 4. Paid plans and refunds
items: Pro and Premium plans are billed monthly or annually; charges are automatic at subscription.
You may cancel anytime; paid fees stop renewing at the end of the current period.
Refunds are generally not offered, except for serious platform defects that prevent use.
When selling digital products, the platform takes a percentage commission per your plan.

sections.title: 5. Content ownership
sections.body: Copyright in content you create on {name} (pages, products, images, text) belongs to you. You grant {name} the rights necessary to use, store, and display that content while providing the service.

sections.title: 6. Service suspension and account termination
sections.body: If you violate these terms or applicable laws, {name} may suspend or terminate your account without refund. We will attempt to give advance notice, but immediate action may be taken for security or legal reasons.

sections.title: 7. Disclaimers
sections.body: {name} provides the service "as is" and "as available." We make no warranties as to availability, accuracy, or uninterrupted operation. We are not liable for any indirect damages arising from use or inability to use the service.

sections.title: 8. Changes to terms
sections.body: We may update these terms from time to time. Major changes will be announced on the site and notified via email. Continued use of {name} constitutes acceptance of revised terms.

sections.title: 9. Contact us
sections.body: Any questions about these terms? Email

privacy.metaDescriptionTpl: {name} privacy policy — how we collect, use, and protect your data.
privacy.intro: {name} ("we") respects and protects every user's privacy. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and the rights you have.

items.rest: Email, username, and password (stored hashed) provided at registration.
Pages, blocks, products, and form submissions you create on {name}.
Anonymous statistics like visitor clicks, views, referrers, and device type.
Card details are handled by Stripe — we do not store full card numbers.

sections.title: 2. How we use data
items: To provide, operate, and improve {name}'s products and services.
To process orders, invoices, refunds, and customer support.
To send product updates, important announcements, and marketing (you can unsubscribe anytime).
To detect fraud, abuse, and protect platform security.

sections.title: 3. Data sharing
sections.body: We do not sell your personal data. We share data with third parties only in these cases:
items: When required by law or government request

sections.title: 4. Your rights
sections.body: You can access, correct, download, or delete your personal data at any time. To exercise these rights, email

sections.title: 5. Cookies
sections.body: We use cookies and similar technologies to maintain login state, store preferences, and analyze site traffic. You can manage or disable cookies via your browser settings.

sections.title: 6. Policy updates
sections.body: We may update this policy from time to time. Major changes will be communicated via email or site announcement. Continued use of {name} constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.

sections.title: 7. Contact us
sections.body: Questions about this privacy policy? Email

about.metaDescription: Beam is the link-in-bio built for creators who care about design. We believe every creator deserves a beautiful page that unites their socials, products, and audience.
about.ogDescription: The link-in-bio built for creators who care about design
about.intro: {name} is the link-in-bio built for creators who care about design. We believe every creator deserves a beautiful page that unites their socials, products, and audience — without fighting their tools' language, payments, or support.
about.missionBody: Help creators launch a branded page in 30 seconds — with selling digital products, capturing emails, and tracking analytics built in from day one. Without needing to pay a subscription to unlock the basics.

whyItems.rest: Theme presets, custom colors, gradient backgrounds, and corner styles — your page should look like *yours*, not a template.
Core features aren't behind a paywall. The Free plan lets you build a page, add 12 blocks, and sell digital products.
No third-party integrations needed — Stripe and email forms work out of the box.
Clicks, views, CTR, and referrer analysis are in every plan, so you actually understand your audience.

contact.metaDescription: Contact the {name} team. Product questions, partnerships, press inquiries — email {email}.
contact.intro: Have a question, partnership idea, or feedback? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.supportBody: Product usage, account issues, payments, refunds
contact.businessBody: Brand collaborations, creator programs, media inquiries
contact.footer: We typically reply within 1–2 business days.

demo.metaDescription: A single page showing everything Beam can do — links, products, video, forms, podcast, collabs.

pricing.heroTag: Pick the plan that fits you
pricing.heroSubtitle: From day-one creator to brand team — Beam scales with you
pricing.roiSubtitle: The more you sell, the better Premium's low commission gets
pricing.roiFootnote: Green marks the best plan at that sales level. Past NT$8,000/mo, Premium pays for itself.

steps.pickStyle: Pick a visual style (corners / animation / brand color)

profileEditor.bannerHint: Recommended size 1200×400 (3:1). Shows at the top of your public page.
profileEditor.socialHelp: Drag the handle to reorder. Click upload to add a custom icon.
profileEditor.iconHint: Square 1:1, 512×512+ (auto-cropped to circle). Transparent PNG / SVG looks best.

themeEditor.cornerStyleHint: Pick a cut-corner style for all card blocks (links, banners, products, carousel…).
themeEditor.entranceHint: Animation each block plays as it enters view. Respects the visitor's reduced-motion preference.
themeEditor.headerSubtitle: Customize your page's look and feel
themeEditor.cornerHint: Pick a cut-corner style for all card blocks (links, banners, products, carousel…).
themeEditor.entranceHint2: Animation each block plays as it enters view. Respects the visitor's reduced-motion preference.

banner.captionPlaceholder: Shown under the image on the public page, line breaks supported

heading.textPlaceholder:
Heading text
Second line works too
**bold** or [link text](https://...)

video.urlHint: Supports youtube.com, youtu.be, tiktok.com, open.spotify.com links
video.descPlaceholder: Small caption shown below the title

carousel.captionPlaceholder: e.g., Seasonal picks / Spring summer drop
carousel.captionHelp: ✨ Shown below the carousel; only appears when a title is set. Also used for Google indexing and accessibility.
carousel.perImageCaptionPlaceholder: Caption for this image (optional, overrides overall caption)

imageGrid.help: Each image displays as a 1:1 square in a two-column grid. Each can have its own click link.
imageGrid.cellTitlePlaceholder: Cell title (overlaid on image — enable 'Text overlay' below)

featureCard.descPlaceholder: Shown alongside the image, multi-line supported
featureCard.positionHint: 💡 For several cards in a row, alternate left/right (e.g., left, right, left) for visual rhythm.

calendar.iconLabel: Event icon (optional, replaces default calendar icon)

overlay.title: Text overlay (Portaly-style hero card)
overlay.hint: When on, title and caption float over the image with an auto-darkened gradient for readability.

subscribers.subtitle: Subscribers collected via Email form blocks
subscribers.emptyHint: Add an "Email form" block to your page to start collecting your list

orders.subtitle: All orders generated through Stripe checkout
orders.upsellTitle: Upgrade to Premium for lower commission
orders.upsellBody: Currently Pro pays 5% commission; you've paid {commission} this period. Premium drops commission to 2%; break-even at NT$8,300+ monthly sales.
orders.emptyHint: Add a "Digital product" block to your page — orders will appear here after a sale.
